title: The Classic Guide To Strategy - Volumes One & Two
notes:
Tracks 1 & 2 recorded February 27, 1983 at OAO Studios, Brooklyn, NY. Originally released in 1983 as "The Classic Guide To Strategy - Volume One".

Tracks 3 - 8 recorded July 30 and September 19, 1985 at Radio City Studio, NY. Originally released in 1986 as "The Classic Guide To Strategy - Volume Two". (Does not include 'Yano Akiro' from the Volume Two Lumina LP release however.)

extraartists.name: John Zorn
extraartists.role: Alto Saxophone, Soprano Saxophone, Clarinet [Eb And Bb Clarinets], Wind [Olt, Weems And Greenhead Game Calls]
